error_signature: data is overwritten before reaching the last node
title: Data Overwritten in ClickUp API Workflow
symptom: Data fetched from the ClickUp API is being overwritten with the first item's value before reaching the Upsert node. This results in incorrect data being processed.
root_cause: The issue arises from using the assignment operator '=' in expressions instead of the comparison operator '=='. This leads to unintended assignments, causing the data to be overwritten with the first item's values.
fix_steps: Locate the expression where the data is being manipulated.
Change the '=' operator to '==' for comparisons.
Save the workflow and test it again.
agent_instruction: Update the expression to use '==' instead of '=' for comparisons.
